lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm, excuse me Mr Progress Hat?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you're just a hat? Can you tell me my Pizazz Point totals?

lines.speaker: Pizazz Hat
lines.text: I suppose you want to know your Pizazz Points.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think you could tell me my Pizazz Points?

lines.speaker: Pizazz Hat
lines.text: That's me, why are you bothering me human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, but do you think you could tell me my Pizazz Points?

lines.speaker: Pizazz Hat
lines.text: Ok, I suppose it's my job. You have: [number] Telekinetic, [number] Alchemist, [number] Enchantment, and [number] Graveyard Pizazz Points.
